title: Hats Off! Datapack
body:
# A datapack that adds new, custom hats


## New Hats!
> This datapack adds **66 new hats** to minecraft

<details>
<summary>List of hats</summary>

- Antlers
- Arrow Hat
- Astronaut Helmet
- Baby Ghast Hat
- Bandana
- Baseball Cap
- Beret
- Bird Hat
- Birthday Hat
- Blåhaj Hat
- Bocchi Hairpin
- Book Hat
- Bowler Hat
- Bucket Helmet
- Bunny Ears
- Capirote
- Cake Hat
- Chad Mask
- Chaplet
- Chef Hat
- Clown Mask
- Cone Helmet
- Cowboy Hat
- Crab Hat
- Crown
- Devil Mask
- Diadem
- Dragon Hat
- Elf Ears
- Fish Hat
- Flower Pot Hat
- Frog Hat
- Gronglet Hat
- Halo
- Hay Hat
- Hood
- Horns
- Kita Ahoge
- Kitsune Mask
- Miku Wig
- Mimic Hat
- Mummy Bandage
- Nijika Ponytail
- Pilot Helmet
- Propeller Hayt
- Santa Hat
- Seal Hat
- Slime Hat
- Solider Helmet
- Sombrero
- Sunglasses
- Teto Drills
- Theatre Mask
- Tophat
- Turtle hat
- TV Helmet
- UFO Hat
- Viking Helmet
- Warden Tendrils
- Witch Hat
- Yippee Hat

</details>

## Reskinning Vanilla Helmets!
> By default, the hats are purely visual

> You can put custom hats onto vanilla helmets, so youre protected while looking fresh, using a new block: the **Headgear Table**

> Reskinning the helmet doesn't affect it's durability or enchantability


## New Items!
> **Headgear Template** - used in the crafting table to make hats

> **Guide to Headgear** - a book with all the new recipes, spawning in some chest loot

### Use the command: ```/trigger hats_off_give``` to place a barrel with every added item and their ingredients

### Available in English and Polish

## Important!
### _This datapack won't work with modded helmets, and it may not work with other datapacks_
